author: Aki Gogikar (OneNewAI)
name: SKC Ternary Reasoner (10L d512)
blurb: SKC Ternary Reasoner: 10L dim=512 vocab=1024 seq=2048. Spectral Koopman Capsule architecture with causal blockwise WHT (block=16), FrequencyBandRouter, KoopmanSpectralEvolution, symmetric UNet capsule skip connections. Muon optimizer, LAWA+SWA weight averaging, engram hash (orders=3), n-gram cache (order=5), temperature scaling, sliding eval. ~39.6M ternary params in ~12.1MB.
